full_text:
Yang Zan
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Zan. Held both civil and army rank, he aided Wang Yun in the two plots against Dong Zhuo. Yang Zan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
